notes: Feature-detect with `'webbleIOS' in window` BEFORE calling any premium method; do not rely on user-agent strings.

`navigator.bluetooth` may exist yet `getAvailability()` return false when the extension is installed but disabled for the current origin — always await getAvailability() before issuing requestDevice().
On Safari without the WebBLE extension, `navigator.bluetooth` is `undefined` entirely — guard the access.
On Chrome/Edge (macOS/Android/Desktop), `navigator.bluetooth` is native and `window.webbleIOS` is absent — premium paths must degrade.
`webbleIOS.getCapabilities()` is forward-compatible: treat unknown keys as additive, never fail closed on missing flags.
